description: The @nullable annotation overrides a NOT NULL column to become nullable in the output

columns.name: id
columns.note: forced nullable via @nullable annotation despite NOT NULL in schema

name: force_nullable
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserForceNullableId
-- @returns :one
-- @nullable id
SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
